channel.title: World on Dark Pawns
channel.description: Recent content in World on Dark Pawns

item.title: Classes
item.description:
Classes

Source: darkpawns.com/class.html
Author: R.E. Paret (Frontline)
Preserved from Wayback Machine capture

Base Classes

THIEVES

Thieves are a shifty lot, and are known to have qualities that no other class offers. They are known to have dabbled in the Black Arts, and possess certain unique skills that make them a valuable addition to any adventuring party. Although prefering to stay inside cities, thieves can be found worldwide, eeking out an existance by robbing other humanoids blind.
